metadata.name: Finance / Capital Tree
metadata.purpose: External TreeView data source for the capital, credit, debt, banking, insurance, investment, payment, collateral, settlement, rating, compliance, default, insolvency, and financial-record layer of the economy.
metadata.schema_backbone: Flat node_id / parent_id records compatible with taxonomy_seed_v0_1, comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2, tree_business_commercial_v0_1, and tree_market_exchange_v0_1
source_notes: Used reference/comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2.json, reference/tree_business_commercial_v0_1.json, and reference/tree_market_exchange_v0_1.json only as schema and viewpoint references, not as taxonomies to copy.

Finance / Capital is treated as a cross-sector financial instrument, capital, risk, permission, payment, settlement, and record layer connecting Consumer, Business, Market, and future Public contexts.

Offers / Terms, Applications / Requests, Contracts / Accounts / Policies, Claims, Payment Schedules, Settlements, Chargebacks, Defaults, and Records are represented through reusable object_folder_templates rather than duplicated as visible TreeView children.

Models, Evidence, and VRQs are deliberately not standard visible TreeView children; models belong to the Model activity tool, evidence belongs as fields/attachments/signals/records, and VRQs belong to the event/message stream.
ReferencePath nodes are thin cross-sector links only; they do not embed Consumer, Business, Market, or Public subtrees.
metadata.relationship_to_consumer_tree: The Human / Consumer tree supplies household need and value comparison contexts. This Finance / Capital tree does not copy that taxonomy; it exposes financial instruments, accounts, credit, insurance, payments, records, ratings, and remedies that can attach to consumer contexts.
metadata.relationship_to_business_tree: The Business / Commercial tree supplies seller-side business types, operations, offers, jobs, and records. This Finance / Capital tree does not copy that taxonomy; it exposes business financing, capital structures, accounts, insurance, payment rails, statements, and credit/risk objects.
metadata.relationship_to_market_tree: The Market / Exchange tree supplies venues, offers, bids, negotiation, settlement flow, and transaction records. This Finance / Capital tree does not copy that taxonomy; it exposes the payment, escrow, credit, insurance, settlement, collateral, and financial-record instruments that support exchange.
metadata.relationship_to_public_tree: Public / Government is not built yet. This tree includes public finance, taxation, grants, regulation, and public debt only as finance-layer classes and reference paths.
